title: Sorting data by column status
excerpt: Hi there. I need to sort data in a table by status. For example, there is a column with numbers (amounts) and another column that assigns status to each number. Is it possible to sort these numbers (amounts) by their sta…

posts.author: Balkwa (Alla)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there. I need to sort data in a table by status. For example, there is a column with numbers (amounts) and another column that assigns status to each number. Is it possible to sort these numbers (amounts) by their status and then, ideally, create a chart that shows sums of the amounts by status?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Balkwa - Welcome to the community! Have you explored either Dashboards or the Chart view for your board yet? Either one will probably provide what you want better than sorting inside the main view.
